title: Guild Assignments
description: As a Magister of the Arcane Circle, you have ongoing responsibilities to the guild. Accept research assignments, gather rare reagents, recover lost artifacts, or investigate magical phenomena. These tasks help advance the guild's knowledge and power while rewarding you for your continued service.

objectives.description: Accept a research assignment from the guild
objectives.notes: Random assignment generated based on current world state
Could be: collect reagents, kill magical creatures, explore ruins, deliver items

objectives.description: Report task completion to Archmage Elara

notes: Repeatable quest. Procedurally generated objectives. Lower rewards than main chain. Provides ongoing engagement with guild.
